query: What is the syllabus of Computer Networks?
answer_preview:
The official syllabus structure available for COMPUTER NETWORKS is as follows.

Semester: III Year B.Tech. I -Semester L T P C

L-T-P-C: 3-1-0-4

Units:
UNIT  I: Network hardware, Network software, OSI, TCP/IP Reference models, Example Networks: ARPANET, Internet. Physical Layer : Guided Transmission media: twisted pairs, coaxial cable, fiber optics, Wireless transmission.

UNIT  II: Data link layer : Design issues, framing, Error detection and correction. Elementary data link protocols: simplex
